## Checklist

- [ ] This PR addresses one focused issue and contains `Closes #<number>`.
- [ ] Development content is English and user-facing interface content is correct Spanish (`es-ES`, `Europe/Madrid`).
- [ ] The branch contains small Conventional Commits and no unrelated changes.
- [ ] Relevant tests were added or updated and all required local checks pass.
- [ ] Coverage thresholds were met without being reduced.
- [ ] Rust formatting, Clippy, tests, frontend build, end-to-end tests, and Windows Tauri build pass when applicable.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog were updated when applicable.
- [ ] No secret, credential, real workspace, private photograph, or veterinary document is included.
- [ ] Offline behaviour and the selected-workspace boundary are preserved.
- [ ] No unexplained warning or untracked generated file remains.
- [ ] Review conversations are resolved and acceptance criteria are complete.
